title: rubus hirtus var. declivis
intro: Rubus hirtus var. declivis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or the Himalayan bramble, is a variety of the raspberry plant native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. declivis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as aiding in the management of digestive issues and lowering blood sugar levels. Rubus hirtus var. declivis is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in the form of jams, syrups, and other food products.
